ValidationRule.description: Blocks IsActive=true while Contact.Status__c='Banned User'. Pairs with Deactivate_User_On_Contact_Ban flow. Lift the ban on the Contact before reactivating.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED( IsActive ) && IsActive = TRUE && TEXT( Contact.Status__c ) = "Banned User"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This user's Contact is marked as a Banned User. Lift the ban (set Contact Status to a non-banned value) before reactivating the user.
